Cusp

Staff Operations Platform

Intelligent staff allocation for multi-location orthodontic and dental practices. Replace text chains and gut feel with data-driven decisions.

Data Models

The Problem

Multi-location practices run on text chains, gut feel, and one person's memory.

Text Chain Chaos

Staffing decisions happen over group texts at 6 AM. No record, no consistency, no optimization.

COO Bottleneck

One person holds all the context. When they're unavailable, the system breaks down.

Invisible Fairness

Staff perceive allocation as arbitrary. No visibility into why decisions are made.

Real Constraints

Norton needs 11 staff by 7:30 AM (75-min drive). Bristol needs 4 assistants Mon/Wed/Fri only. Training days remove your fastest worker.

What Cusp Does

A complete staff operations platform — from allocation to performance tracking to day-of incident management.

1. Smart Staff Allocation

OR-Tools constraint solver generates 2 scored solutions. HR compares side-by-side and selects. Manual overrides with full audit trail.

2. Performance Tracking

Tablet-based patient tap logging with offline support. Dual outlier detection (percentage + absolute) flags coaching opportunities.

3. Availability Management

Staff submit time-off requests. Managers approve. The solver automatically accounts for who's available.

4. Executive Oversight

Dashboard with staffing status, coverage gaps, action items. Weekly trend reports with 30-day rolling averages.

5. Day-of Incident Tracking

Call-in and late tracking with automatic coverage gap detection. Notifications to clinic leads and HR escalation for critical offices.

6. Demand Forecasting

Predict staffing needs from historical patient volume data. Forecasts feed into the allocation engine when real data is unavailable.

7. Coverage Gap Assistant

Detects coverage gaps from absences and understaffing. Ranks replacement candidates by fairness, proximity, skills, and overtime risk.

8. Float Fairness

Tracks how often each staff member works away from home. Solver optimizes for equitable distribution of float assignments.

Executive Dashboard

One screen to see everything: staffing status, coverage gaps, action items, and recent allocation runs.

Executive Dashboard — quick stats, per-office staffing with names, action items, recent allocation runs

Click any screenshot to enlarge

The Allocation Engine

OR-Tools CP-SAT constraint solver with an 8-dimension, 100-point scoring system.

100-Point Scoring System (8 Dimensions)

Patient/Staff Ratio
40 pts
Overtime Avoidance
20 pts
Training Day Preservation
10 pts
Travel Time Feasibility
10 pts
Staff Preference Alignment
10 pts
Understaffing Risk
10 pts
Float Fairness
bonus
Consecutive Remote Guard
10 pts
Allocation Runs — view all runs with status, date range, and comparison links
Solution Comparison — side-by-side scoring breakdown for 2 generated solutions

Schedule & Staff Management

View by date, by staff, or by office. Score breakdowns visible on every allocation.

Schedule — by date with office, staff assignments, roles, shift times, and status
Staff Detail — profile with skills, experience tier, notification preferences

Productivity Tracking

Dual outlier detection flags coaching opportunities. Weekly trends reveal patterns across offices.

Productivity Dashboard — per-office efficiency summaries, staff metrics with outlier flags
Outlier Alerts — flagged staff with High/Low indicators for targeted coaching
Weekly Trends — configurable week range with efficiency overlay and summary table
Tablet Tap Log — offline-first patient logging, auto-sync, new patient vs recall tracking

Office & Staff Roster

Manage locations with chair counts, shift templates, and arrival times. Full staff roster with roles, skills, and experience tiers.

Offices — locations with chair count, patient capacity, operating days, and arrival times
Office Detail — address, timezone, shift templates with minimum staffing requirements
Staff List — searchable roster with role, office, experience tier, status, and notification preferences

API-Ready Capabilities

Fully built backend APIs ready for frontend integration. These features power the platform behind the scenes.

Coverage Gap Assistant

Detects gaps from absences and understaffing. Ranks replacement candidates across 4 dimensions: float fairness (30pts), proximity (30pts), skills match (25pts), overtime risk (15pts).

Day-of Incident Tracking

Call-in and late incident management. Call-ins auto-create absences and trigger coverage gap detection. Late incidents notify clinic leads with escalation to HR for critical offices.

Demand Forecasting

Weighted moving average predictions from 8 weeks of patient volume data. Forecasts feed into the allocation solver when real volume data is unavailable. Accuracy reporting with MAPE/MAE metrics.

Score Explanations

Plain-language explanations for all 8 scoring dimensions. Each dimension gets a rating (good/moderate/needs attention) with specific reasoning. Identifies weakest areas automatically.

Staff Requests

Clinic leads request additional staff for their office. Specify role needed and reason. HR/admin fulfills or denies with resolution tracking.

Float History & Fairness

Tracks every away-from-home assignment. Summary and detail APIs show float distribution per staff member. Consecutive remote guard prevents 3+ weeks at the same remote office.

Development Roadmap

17 sprints complete. Core platform built with advanced operational features.

Phase 1: Foundation

Complete

User auth, office/staff models, roles, skills, CSV import, availability workflow.

Phase 2: Allocation Engine

Complete

OR-Tools CP-SAT solver, 100-point scoring, 2-solution generation, manual override with audit trail, SMS notifications.

Phase 3: Productivity Tracking

Complete

Tablet tap logging (offline-first), daily aggregation, dual outlier detection, weekly trend reports.

Phase 4: Polish & Multi-Tenancy

Complete

Executive dashboard, SMS consent (TCPA), notification preferences, float fairness tracking, multi-tenant isolation, frontend test coverage.

Phase 5: Hardening

Complete

Day-of absence workflow, doctor staffing summaries, missing tap log detection, call-in/late tracking, overtime scoring accuracy, score explanations.

Phase 6: Demand Forecasting

Complete

Weighted moving average predictions, solver fallback integration, accuracy reporting (MAPE/MAE/bias), per-office breakdowns.

Phase 7: Coverage Assistant

Complete

Gap detection from absences and understaffing. 4-dimension candidate ranking engine. Auto-detect on absence, auto-expire on cancel.

Phase 8: Pre-Pilot Hardening

In Progress

Role.is_doctor flag, TextChoices sweep, incident notifications, consecutive remote guard, exception narrowing, test fixture centralization. Preparing for pilot deployment.

2-Week Pilot at Johnson City

Next

Live deployment with real staff. Allocation tuning with actual data. Feedback collection and iteration.

Patient Communication

Future

Automated patient notifications, appointment reminders, and 2-way SMS. Includes HIPAA compliance review.

Task Lists & Daily Management

Future

Per-office daily task checklists, opening/closing procedures, and accountability tracking for clinic leads.

Practice Management Integration

Future

Cloud9/Gage integration when API becomes available. Pull real patient schedules and procedure data directly.

Culture Fit Assessment

Future

AI-assisted hiring screening tool. Match candidates to office culture and team dynamics.

Technical Foundation

Production-grade architecture with comprehensive test coverage.

931
Backend Tests
112
Frontend Tests
126
E2E Tests
96
API Endpoints
22
Data Models
5
Django Apps

Backend

Django 5.2 + Django Ninja, PostgreSQL 16, Celery + Redis, OR-Tools CP-SAT solver, Pydantic 2 schemas.

Frontend

React 19, TypeScript strict, shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4, TanStack Query, Zustand, Recharts.

Multi-Tenant

Full data isolation — every model scoped by tenant FK. 30+ cross-tenant leakage tests verify isolation across all endpoints.

Offline-First

IndexedDB-backed tablet logging with background sync, clock drift detection, and idempotent UUID uploads.

TCPA Compliant

SMS consent tracking on all 4 notification paths. Multi-channel preferences (SMS/email/both/none) with audit trail.

Transparent Scoring

8-dimension scoring with plain-language explanations. Every allocation decision is auditable and explainable.

Built with Django, React, and OR-Tools · Cusp Staff Operations Platform · 17 Sprints
